ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a loyalty member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "anniversary_date" TEXT /* Anniversary or significant date of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., favorite products, preferred store) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount spent on the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the purchase was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied during the purchase */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., flagship, neighborhood) */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store they manage */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "current_inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product in days */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier */,
  "last_delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of the last delivery */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_items" (
  "purchase_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase item */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item at the time of purchase */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES customer_purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" REAL /* Points earned per dollar spent */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate offered to loyalty members */,
  "max_points" INTEGER /* Maximum points a customer can earn in the program */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the customer */,
  "last_redemption_date" TEXT /* Date of the last point redemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the promotion applies to */,
  "promotion_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the promotion image */,
  "target_customer_group" TEXT /* Target customer group for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or detailed feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., restock, sale) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity of the change */,
  "new_inventory_level" INTEGER /* New inventory level after the change */,
  "log_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the inventory change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorder_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder request */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the reorder request was made */,
  "quantity_requested" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_requests_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorder_requests_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Delivery date of the order */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
